document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Inactive VAT List - Deactivated Persons w.e.f. 2025-11-18
subsection: Landing page summary and legal basis
text: IRD Sri Lanka Inactive VAT List landing page. The page states that under section 16 of the Value Added Tax Act No. 14 of 2002, the Commissioner General shall publish on the Department website the names and registration numbers of persons whose VAT registration has been decided as inactive, and that the published list shall be updated monthly notwithstanding section 73 of the VAT Act. The landing page links to the current attachment titled List of VAT Registration Deactivated Persons, effective 2025-11-18, and also links to certificate authenticity verification. The attached source used for the detailed list is https://www.ird.gov.lk/en/publications/VAT_Inactive_List/VAT_Deactive_18_11_2025.pdf
